response.justification: Candidate significantly exceeds the 6+ years requirement with 20 years of documented full-stack experience and currently works at the company in a closely related role, demonstrating TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AI-agent infrastructure expertise. However, primary-stack frameworks (Nest.js) and testing tools (Vitest, Playwright) are not explicitly mentioned on the resume. Core fundamentals are present; interview needed to confirm specific framework proficiency and customer-oriented delivery practices.
strengths: 20+ years of full-stack engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems; currently working at company with described tech stack
Demonstrated expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, and AI-agent/MCP development
Shows software craftsmanship practices including TDD, CI/CD, and architectural thinking across multiple senior roles
concerns: Nest.js—listed as primary framework—not explicitly mentioned despite extensive Node.js background
Testing framework expertise (Jest/Vitest/Playwright) not demonstrated; only TDD and Selenium mentioned
Customer-oriented delivery focus and user-needs orientation not evident in resume; PostgreSQL and Kotlin also not mentioned

key_factors.factor: Experience depth and demonstrated full-stack capability
Primary framework (Nest.js) and testing tool (Vitest) not explicitly named
Current work at company with TypeScript/Node.js/AI-agent infrastructure
